item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]

item.title: Packaging Barcode Label Creator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Packaging Barcode Label Creator [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodelabelmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Packaging Barcode Label Creator
(Office Apps)
Free download Packaging Barcode Labels Maker program from www.barcodelabelmakersoftware.com provide facility to design readable, fashionable stickers in advance linear and two-dimensional font standards. Comprehensive and flexible Barcode tag creator program store all generated batch, labels, stickers pictures in different image extension including EXIF, GIF, JPEG, TIFF, Bitmap, PNG at specified computer location.
[read more]

item.title: Unerase Digital Picture Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Unerase Digital Picture Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Unerase Digital Picture Tool
(Utilities)
Photo retrieval application is cost effective tool that retrieves all your misplaced family album, lost digital snapshots or deleted pictures from Windows hard disk drive, memory cards (including Mini sD, xD picture card, compact flash, MMC card etc.), digital camera of any mega pixel resolution and other removable USB storage media. Erased picture recovery utility is GUI based that supports restoration of all major file formats including jpg, mpg, jpeg, gif, riff, tiff or bmp. Retrieval software for digital images unerase erased digital photo files even if system generated error messages like “Drive Not Detected” or "Drive Not Formatted” are being displayed on your computer screen while accessing media. Digital image salvage tool recovers encrypted snaps lost due to unwanted circumstances like virus attack, media formatting, logical crash, corruption of master boot record, software/hardware malfunctioning or human error. File rescue software for digital photographs is compatible with all major manufacturers including Konica-Minolta, Transcend, Samsung, Hitachi, Panasonic, PRETEC, Sony, Western Digital, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji film, Olympus and other manufacturers. Erased picture restoration utility facilitates with thumbnail preview of retrievable digital files before saving them at user specified location.Features:* Digital photo retrieval program restores all lost picture albums from hard disk drive, inaccessible USB memory devices or damaged camera memory card.* Digital snaps backup tool uses advanced file recovery algorithms to easily regain lost snaps even after corruption in MBR, MFT, DBR and FAT.* Erased picture recovery application undelete deleted pictures and supports every type of digital card reader on your computer.* Damaged image salvage tool is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10=,Windows 8, 7, XP and Vista.

[read more]

Erased picture recovery utility is GUI based that supports restoration of all major file formats including jpg, mpg, jpeg, gif, riff, tiff or bmp. Digital image salvage tool recovers encrypted snaps lost due to unwanted circumstances like virus attack, media formatting, logical crash, corruption of master boot record, software/hardware malfunctioning or human error. File rescue software for digital photographs is compatible with all major manufacturers including Konica-Minolta, Transcend, Samsung, Hitachi, Panasonic, PRETEC, Sony, Western Digital, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji film, Olympus and other manufacturers. Erased picture restoration utility facilitates with thumbnail preview of retrievable digital files before saving them at user specified location.Features:* Digital photo retrieval program restores all lost picture albums from hard disk drive, inaccessible USB memory devices or damaged camera memory card.* Digital snaps backup tool uses advanced file recovery algorithms to easily regain lost snaps even after corruption in MBR, MFT, DBR and FAT.* Erased picture recovery application undelete deleted pictures and supports every type of digital card reader on your computer.* Damaged image salvage tool is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10=,Windows 8, 7, XP and Vista.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Unerase Digital Picture Tool
(Utilities)
Photo retrieval application is cost effective tool that retrieves all your misplaced family album, lost digital snapshots or deleted pictures from Windows hard disk drive, memory cards (including Mini sD, xD picture card, compact flash, MMC card etc.), digital camera of any mega pixel resolution and other removable USB storage media. Erased picture recovery utility is GUI based that supports restoration of all major file formats including jpg, mpg, jpeg, gif, riff, tiff or bmp. Retrieval software for digital images unerase erased digital photo files even if system generated error messages like “Drive Not Detected” or "Drive Not Formatted” are being displayed on your computer screen while accessing media. Digital image salvage tool recovers encrypted snaps lost due to unwanted circumstances like virus attack, media formatting, logical crash, corruption of master boot record, software/hardware malfunctioning or human error. File rescue software for digital photographs is compatible with all major manufacturers including Konica-Minolta, Transcend, Samsung, Hitachi, Panasonic, PRETEC, Sony, Western Digital, Kodak, Nikon, Fuji film, Olympus and other manufacturers. Erased picture restoration utility facilitates with thumbnail preview of retrievable digital files before saving them at user specified location.Features:* Digital photo retrieval program restores all lost picture albums from hard disk drive, inaccessible USB memory devices or damaged camera memory card.* Digital snaps backup tool uses advanced file recovery algorithms to easily regain lost snaps even after corruption in MBR, MFT, DBR and FAT.* Erased picture recovery application undelete deleted pictures and supports every type of digital card reader on your computer.* Damaged image salvage tool is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10=,Windows 8, 7, XP and Vista.

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Joplin [Notes]
item.itunes:title: Joplin [Notes]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Joplin
(Notes)
Joplin is a city in Jasper and Newton counties in the southwestern corner of the U.S. state of Missouri. The bulk of the city is in Jasper County, while the southern portion is in Newton County. Joplin is the largest city located within both Jasper and Newton Counties – even though it is not the county seat of either county. With a population of 51,762 as of the 2020 census, Joplin is the 13th most-populous city in the state. The city covers an area of 35.69 square miles on the outer edge of the Ozark Mountains. Joplin is the main hub of the three-county Joplin-Miami, Missouri-Oklahoma Metro area, which is home to 210,077 people making it the 5th largest metropolitan area in Missouri. In May 2011, a violent EF5 tornado killed more than 150 people and destroyed one-third of the city.
NOTE: Im just the provider, not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Joplin
(Notes)
Joplin is a city in Jasper and Newton counties in the southwestern corner of the U.S. state of Missouri. The bulk of the city is in Jasper County, while the southern portion is in Newton County. Joplin is the largest city located within both Jasper and Newton Counties – even though it is not the county seat of either county. With a population of 51,762 as of the 2020 census, Joplin is the 13th most-populous city in the state. The city covers an area of 35.69 square miles on the outer edge of the Ozark Mountains. Joplin is the main hub of the three-county Joplin-Miami, Missouri-Oklahoma Metro area, which is home to 210,077 people making it the 5th largest metropolitan area in Missouri. In May 2011, a violent EF5 tornado killed more than 150 people and destroyed one-third of the city.
NOTE: Im just the provider, not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Joplin
(Notes)
Joplin is a city in Jasper and Newton counties in the southwestern corner of the U.S. state of Missouri. The bulk of the city is in Jasper County, while the southern portion is in Newton County. Joplin is the largest city located within both Jasper and Newton Counties – even though it is not the county seat of either county. With a population of 51,762 as of the 2020 census, Joplin is the 13th most-populous city in the state. The city covers an area of 35.69 square miles on the outer edge of the Ozark Mountains. Joplin is the main hub of the three-county Joplin-Miami, Missouri-Oklahoma Metro area, which is home to 210,077 people making it the 5th largest metropolitan area in Missouri. In May 2011, a violent EF5 tornado killed more than 150 people and destroyed one-third of the city.
NOTE: Im just the provider, not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Scribus [Printing]
item.itunes:title: Scribus [Printing]
item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96
item.itunes:summary:
Scribus
(Printing)
Scribus is free and open-source desktop publishing software available for most desktop operating systems. It is designed for layout, typesetting, and preparation of files for professional-quality image-setting equipment. Scribus can also create animated and interactive PDF presentations and forms. Example uses include writing newspapers, brochures, newsletters, posters, and books. The Scribus 1.4 series are the current stable releases, and the 1.5 series where developments are made available in preparation for the next stable release series, version 1.6. Scribus is written in Qt and released under the GNU General Public License. There are native versions available for Unix, Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Microsoft Windows, OS/2 operating systems.
NOTE: Im not the devoleper, just provide the app.
[read more]
item.description:
Scribus
(Printing)
Scribus is free and open-source desktop publishing software available for most desktop operating systems. It is designed for layout, typesetting, and preparation of files for professional-quality image-setting equipment. Scribus can also create animated and interactive PDF presentations and forms. Example uses include writing newspapers, brochures, newsletters, posters, and books. The Scribus 1.4 series are the current stable releases, and the 1.5 series where developments are made available in preparation for the next stable release series, version 1.6. Scribus is written in Qt and released under the GNU General Public License. There are native versions available for Unix, Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Microsoft Windows, OS/2 operating systems.
NOTE: Im not the devoleper, just provide the app.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Scribus
(Printing)
Scribus is free and open-source desktop publishing software available for most desktop operating systems. It is designed for layout, typesetting, and preparation of files for professional-quality image-setting equipment. Scribus can also create animated and interactive PDF presentations and forms. Example uses include writing newspapers, brochures, newsletters, posters, and books. The Scribus 1.4 series are the current stable releases, and the 1.5 series where developments are made available in preparation for the next stable release series, version 1.6. Scribus is written in Qt and released under the GNU General Public License. There are native versions available for Unix, Linux, BSD, macOS, Haiku, Microsoft Windows, OS/2 operating systems.
NOTE: Im not the devoleper, just provide the app.
[read more]

item.itunes:author: zrch-garcia-96

Webcamoid
(Webcam & Monitoring)
Webcamoid is a webcam app focused on providing all major features required by power users with a very simple and intuitive interface.
NOTE: Im not the developer, just provide the app.

item.title: Unformat Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Unformat Digital Camera Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: digitalcamera
item.itunes:summary:
Unformat Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camcorder digital camera undelete software is helpful to restore all erased or accidently deleted pictures images snaps audio video files clips even when media is corrupted or memory card being pulled out while the camera is on. Download unformat digital camera to recover your missing data lost due to improper device handling, accidental removal, human error, software hardware malfunctions, virus attacks etc. Novelty camera video files restoration program has the ability to unerase all erased or infected jpg jpeg bmp png gif tiff riff mov wav midi 3gp mpeg audio video files clips from all crashed or formatted digital camera memory cards. Advanced digital camera pictures rescue software supports all raw formats of digicam including .x3f (Sigma), .erf (Epson), .fff (Imacon), .rwz (Rawzor), .orf (Olympus), .raf (Fuji), .3fr (Hasselblad), .cap .tif .iiq (Phase One), .crw .cr2 (Canon), .nef .nrw (Nikon), .tif .k25 .kdc .dcs .dcr .drf (Kodak), .mrw (Minolta), .dng (Adobe), .r3d (Red), .bay (Casio), .ptx .pef (Pentax), .mos (Leaf), .arw .srf .sr2 (Sony) etc. Digital camera data recovery software rescue deleted audio video files even when drive not formatted, drive not detected, abort retry etc messages are displayed on your device.Features:* No technical knowledge is required to operate it because of its user friendly GUI facility that helps users to recover lost pictures images without any loss.* Software successfully runs on all versions of windows operating system including Vista windows 7, 8, 10, and 11 etc.* Digital camera photos uneraser software can recover pictures images from virus infected memory stick duo, compact flash card, IDE, SATA, PCMCIA memory cards etc.* Restore virus infected jpg bmp png midi mov wav audio video files from formatted multimedia memory cards.

[read more]
item.description:
Unformat Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camcorder digital camera undelete software is helpful to restore all erased or accidently deleted pictures images snaps audio video files clips even when media is corrupted or memory card being pulled out while the camera is on. Download unformat digital camera to recover your missing data lost due to improper device handling, accidental removal, human error, software hardware malfunctions, virus attacks etc. Novelty camera video files restoration program has the ability to unerase all erased or infected jpg jpeg bmp png gif tiff riff mov wav midi 3gp mpeg audio video files clips from all crashed or formatted digital camera memory cards. Advanced digital camera pictures rescue software supports all raw formats of digicam including .x3f (Sigma), .erf (Epson), .fff (Imacon), .rwz (Rawzor), .orf (Olympus), .raf (Fuji), .3fr (Hasselblad), .cap .tif .iiq (Phase One), .crw .cr2 (Canon), .nef .nrw (Nikon), .tif .k25 .kdc .dcs .dcr .drf (Kodak), .mrw (Minolta), .dng (Adobe), .r3d (Red), .bay (Casio), .ptx .pef (Pentax), .mos (Leaf), .arw .srf .sr2 (Sony) etc. Digital camera data recovery software rescue deleted audio video files even when drive not formatted, drive not detected, abort retry etc messages are displayed on your device.Features:* No technical knowledge is required to operate it because of its user friendly GUI facility that helps users to recover lost pictures images without any loss.* Software successfully runs on all versions of windows operating system including Vista windows 7, 8, 10, and 11 etc.* Digital camera photos uneraser software can recover pictures images from virus infected memory stick duo, compact flash card, IDE, SATA, PCMCIA memory cards etc.* Restore virus infected jpg bmp png midi mov wav audio video files from formatted multimedia memory cards.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Unformat Digital Camera Recovery
(Utilities)
Camcorder digital camera undelete software is helpful to restore all erased or accidently deleted pictures images snaps audio video files clips even when media is corrupted or memory card being pulled out while the camera is on. Download unformat digital camera to recover your missing data lost due to improper device handling, accidental removal, human error, software hardware malfunctions, virus attacks etc. Novelty camera video files restoration program has the ability to unerase all erased or infected jpg jpeg bmp png gif tiff riff mov wav midi 3gp mpeg audio video files clips from all crashed or formatted digital camera memory cards. Advanced digital camera pictures rescue software supports all raw formats of digicam including .x3f (Sigma), .erf (Epson), .fff (Imacon), .rwz (Rawzor), .orf (Olympus), .raf (Fuji), .3fr (Hasselblad), .cap .tif .iiq (Phase One), .crw .cr2 (Canon), .nef .nrw (Nikon), .tif .k25 .kdc .dcs .dcr .drf (Kodak), .mrw (Minolta), .dng (Adobe), .r3d (Red), .bay (Casio), .ptx .pef (Pentax), .mos (Leaf), .arw .srf .sr2 (Sony) etc. Digital camera data recovery software rescue deleted audio video files even when drive not formatted, drive not detected, abort retry etc messages are displayed on your device.Features:* No technical knowledge is required to operate it because of its user friendly GUI facility that helps users to recover lost pictures images without any loss.* Software successfully runs on all versions of windows operating system including Vista windows 7, 8, 10, and 11 etc.* Digital camera photos uneraser software can recover pictures images from virus infected memory stick duo, compact flash card, IDE, SATA, PCMCIA memory cards etc.* Restore virus infected jpg bmp png midi mov wav audio video files from formatted multimedia memory cards.

[read more]

item.title: Library Barcodes Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Library Barcodes Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Library Barcodes Software
(Office Apps)
Do want to buy some utility that helps you to generate barcode labels in bulk? Just take a look at www.barcodelabelmaker.net refers to Library Barcodes software from that provides smart and unique printing facility to print crafted barcode labels using barcode printer. Advanced barcodes generator tool creates customized or personalized multicolor barcode tags and stickers in negligible time.

[read more]
